steps.title: Identify the revealing contrast
steps.content: Oscar shows interest when the woman mentions “those wonderful words,” asking “Which wonderful words?” immediately. The moment he learns they're Mr. Wills' words—not his own—he “loses interest and returns to his writing.” This reversal in just a few lines is the key.

steps.title: Explain what the contrast reveals
steps.content:
The reversal shows Oscar briefly hoped the woman admired his writing—the moment that hope dies, so does his interest.

The other choices either blame general work interruption or misread his behavior as professional when he actually drops engagement abruptly.

That is the correct answer.
